title: portulaca fulgens
intro: Portulaca fulgens, also known as the Mexican rose or orange portulaca, is a species of flowering plant in the purslane family. It is used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce fever. The plant's medicinal properties also contribute to its health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. Portulaca fulgens can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies for its calming and relaxing effects.
